title: Glinty Glint
body:
This pack changes enchantment *glint* to the real *glint*. [Video *demon*stration.](https://youtu.be/cu0kjXEk7iI)

Configurable with new 23w05a glint settings.

Color can be configured in `minecraft/shaders/core/rendertype_glint_direct.fsh`, 3rd line.

Color can be written as `vec3(R, G, B) / 255.0`.

Can work with Sodium. Optifine not requied. #noptifine

Leather overbright issue is minecraft bug because enchantment glint lays on it two times.

Wanted bugs.
